provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Stamp Duty (Bank Transactions) (Exemption) Order.

No stamp duty shall be payable in respect of any receipt given by any customer of a banker to the banker for any payment or credit made or given by the banker to such customer save where such a receipt is in relation to a loan made by the banker under an agreement for a loan.
